programme.desc: In 1952, Hollywood power couple Lucille Ball and Desi Arnaz face a series of personal and professional crises that threaten their careers, their relationship and their hit TV show.

programme.title: Sister of the Groom
programme.desc: During a destination wedding weekend, a woman and her loyal husband plan a series of embarrassing mishaps to ruin the relationship between her brother and his new bride.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: A woman tries to save a small, historic hotel from developers, but she soon realizes that the man she's falling for is behind the hotel's development plans.

programme.title: This Time Each Year
programme.desc: Despite a trial separation, Lauren pretends to still be with her husband, Kevin, to placate her overbearing mother. The ruse may be just what the couple needs to finally work on their marriage.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Clika
programme.desc: When a clip of his performance goes viral, a small-town singer seizes the opportunity to carve out a place for himself on the music scene. Caught in a dangerous game, he must confront the choices he's made as he relentlessly pursues his dream.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: The Carpenter's Son
programme.desc: A remote village in Egypt explodes into spiritual warfare when a carpenter, his wife and their son Jesus are targeted by supernatural forces.

programme.title: The Roses
programme.desc: Life seems easy for picture-perfect couple Theo and Ivy: successful careers, a loving marriage, great kids. However, a tinderbox of fierce competition and hidden resentments soon emerge when Theo's career nosedives and Ivy's own ambitions take off.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Hank wants to change methods; Wanda uncovers a shocking truth about founding pioneer woman Jane T. Wright; Oscar tries to sneak into the fair despite being banned.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent, Hank and Emma have a viral video contest; Karen and Davis try to GPS tag the locals; Lacey asks Wanda to secure her Wi-Fi.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash draws on his war zone experience when extreme weather causes the hospital to lose power.

programme.title: Solemates
programme.desc: A love triangle between a shoe store owner, a customer and an old pair of shoes. When Andrew walks into William's store to replace his own worn old pair of brogues, interest is piqued.

programme.title: Hitpig!
programme.desc: A clever bounty-hunting pig must return a dancing elephant to a Las Vegas circus to collect $1 million. However, when the mission goes sideways, he soon realizes that no amount of money is worth losing his newfound friends.

programme.title: Gone Mom: The Disappearance of Jennifer Dulos
programme.desc: Police investigate Fotis Dulos when his wife, Jennifer, mysteriously disappears after driving their five children to school.

programme.title: Stephen King's It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: No One Will Save You
programme.desc: Brynn finds solace within the walls of the home where she grew up until she's awakened one night by strange noises from unearthly intruders.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: After years of being sheltered from the human world, the Turtle brothers set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. Their new friend, April O'Neil, helps them take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Borderlands
programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandora's most explosive secrets.

programme.title: On the Roam
programme.desc: Jason Momoa travels across the country to meet the extraordinary individuals blazing their own path.

programme.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
programme.desc: Dr. Kelson makes a discovery that could change the world, while Spike's encounter with cult leader Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: As a future war between the human race and artificial intelligence rages on, ex-special forces agent Joshua is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI. The Creator has developed a mysterious weapon that has the power to end the war and all of mankind. As Joshua and his team of elite operatives venture into enemy-occupied territory, they soon discover the w

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Nope
programme.desc: A man and his sister discover something sinister in the skies above their California horse ranch, while the owner of a nearby theme park tries to profit from the mysterious, otherworldly phenomenon.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Soul on Fire
programme.desc: A tragic accident leaves 9-year-old John O'Leary with burns covering 100% of his body. He soon embarks on a miraculous road to recovery with support from family, the community, and baseball announcer Jack Buck. Grateful for the gift of life, John becomes a motivational speaker who inspires millions of people to make the world a better place.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.
